subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the story and its deeper meaning
Identify poetic devices like rhyme, rhythm, and repetition
Connect moral lessons to real-life situations

lesson_plan.title: Introduction and Context
topics_covered: Overview of folklore and legend poems
Poet’s approach in teaching morals through stories
Introduction to main characters and setting
teaching_strategy: Teacher reads the poem aloud with intonation
Class discussion on legends and moral lessons
student_activities: Take notes on characters and setting
Discuss in pairs the idea of legends in their culture

lesson_plan.title: Detailed Character Analysis
topics_covered: Little woman: traits, actions, and consequences
teaching_strategy: Explain character traits using examples from poem
Ask students why characters act in certain ways
student_activities: Write character traits with supporting lines from poem

lesson_plan.title: Story Events and Plot Analysis
topics_covered: Sequence of events and cause-effect relationship
Transformation as a consequence of actions
teaching_strategy: Break poem into events and discuss each stanza
Encourage students to create a plot map
student_activities: Draw a plot diagram showing cause and effect
Explain in own words the sequence of events

lesson_plan.title: Poetic Devices and Literary Techniques
topics_covered: How devices enhance storytelling and moral
teaching_strategy: Discuss effect of devices on mood and meaning
student_activities: Identify poetic devices in the poem
Explain how these devices help convey moral and story

lesson_plan.title: Moral Lessons and Reflection
topics_covered: Understanding moral lessons about selfishness and consequences
Application of moral lessons to daily life
Discussion on cultural significance of legends
teaching_strategy: Class discussion on moral and ethical reflections
Encourage students to relate to real-life situations
student_activities: Write a paragraph explaining the moral lesson
Share examples from personal experience where selfishness led to consequences

teaching_aids: Charts showing plot and character relationships
Handouts for poetic devices and moral reflections
teacher_tip: Encourage students to analyze characters, connect plot to moral lessons, and identify poetic devices that enhance the storytelling.
